3131530.name: Mashinky Demo
3131530.description: Independent strategy video game created by Jan Zelený. The combination of procedurally generated challenges, realistic graphics and board-game-like straightforward rules. It is a challenging business simulation game with everything around cargo delivery. The player acts as a entrepreneur in control of a transport company. He needs to lay tracks, roads and airports on a difficult terrain, invent and buy new vehicles, project routes and compete against economical rules to make as much profit by transporting passengers and various cargo types as possible to progress to another historical era.
3131530.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 匈牙利语, 波兰语, 俄语, 乌克兰语, 捷克语, 希腊语
